diagrams.title: Assignment Flow Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows how values flow from right to left in assignment

diagrams.title: Compound Assignment Execution
diagrams.description: Shows step-by-step evaluation of compound assignment a += b
diagrams.purpose: Understand how compound operators work internally

diagrams.title: Primitive vs Reference Assignment
diagrams.description: Contrasts how primitive types and objects are assigned
elements: Primitive: value copied to new variable
Reference: memory address copied, both point to same object
diagrams.purpose: Understand the difference in memory behavior

diagrams.title: Chained Assignment Flow
diagrams.description: Shows right-to-left evaluation in chained assignment a = b = c = 10
diagrams.purpose: Understand evaluation order in chained assignments
